mapper.sql: post_id, user_id, category_id, title, content, image_urls, status, longitude, latitude, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, is_anonymous, is_top, publish_time, reviewer_id, review_time, review_remark, price, transaction_mode, contact_info
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 ORDER BY is_top DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY is_top DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 2 ORDER BY is_top DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM post WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY publish_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM post WHERE status != 0 ORDER BY is_top DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM post WHERE publish_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY publish_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 2)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT FROM post WHERE category_id = #{type} AND status = 2 ORDER BY is_top DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE category_id = #{type} AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE review_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( post_id, user_id, category_id, title, content, image_urls, status, longitude, latitude, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, is_anonymous, publish_time, reviewer_id, review_time, review_remark, price, transaction_mode, contact_info ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrls,typeHandler=cn.edu.ccst.communitysocialmain.typehandler.DelimitedStringListTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{collectCount}, #{isAnonymous}, #{publishTime}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewTime}, #{reviewRemark}, #{price}, #{transactionMode}, #{contactInfo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND comment_count > 0
UPDATE post SET collect_count = collect_count - 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND collect_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.image_urls, p.status, p.longitude, p.latitude, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.is_anonymous, p.publish_time, p.reviewer_id, p.review_time, p.review_remark, p.price, p.transaction_mode, p.contact_info FROM post p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.community = #{community} AND p.status = 2 ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.community = #{community} AND p.status = 2
